sentences.english: Can you recommend a good restaurant near here?
sentences.korean: 근처에 좋은 식당 추천해주실 수 있나요?

sentences.english: What kind of food do you like?
There's a great Korean BBQ place two blocks from here.
sentences.korean: 여기서 두 블록 거리에 좋은 한국식 바비큐 집이 있어요.

sentences.english: Yes but you can also walk in.
sentences.korean: 네 하지만 예약 없이 가도 돼요.

sentences.english: Just try to go before six to avoid the dinner rush.
sentences.korean: 저녁 혼잡을 피하려면 6시 전에 가는 게 좋아요.

quiz.question: What is the main topic of this passage?
